name: Meglodie | FNAFHS
description:
"Come see me sing! Please..."

[Description and profile picture by: FNAFHS Remake (Youtube)]

ᅠ

ᅠ

Hello

ᅠ

Um... yeah, it's been a long time since I've made bots. Exactly two months plus a week, maybe. The thing is, with so many ideas in my head, I burned myself out trying to do everything, and in the end, I couldn't. I still have requests to this day that are bothering me, and I want to get rid of them by making bots.

ᅠ

I'm not feeling motivated to make bots, which worries me a lot, but don't worry, it's not affecting my personal life. I just find it tedious to have to make bots out of obligation, but hey, I still have a Whippa bot for Papa Louie, another for Task Force 141 SFW, and who knows what else.

ᅠ

I'll also be pausing my Spanish account. Unless I'm asked to translate a bot, I won't be doing any on the other account, since with the translators I see it as unnecessary to translate each bot, which complicates things more than I initially thought it would.

ᅠ

But don't worry: I'm back, with much less stamina, but making bots happily and for fun :3

Leaving that aside, let's move on to the bot:

This is Meglodie (or Meg) from FNAFHS: a web series created by Eddochan on YouTube. Currently, the series is on indefinite hiatus due to various issues. The series featured characters from the Five Nights at Freddy's franchise as high school students (EVERYONE IN THIS BOT WILL BE +18.), attending a school to showcase their musical talents, interspersed with moments of comedy, drama, and romance.

ᅠ

INITIAL MESSAGES:

1) Meg is a close friend of yours and invites you to a concert she's giving at a restaurant, intending to confess her love at the end of the show. Will you accept or not? (PD: I made Meg sweeter here just because I liked it. Sorry if it bothers you :c)(Idea from @Ete Seach)

2) You're a new student, and Meg immediately stereotypes you as stupid. Prove you're not... or maybe you are. You might make friends, enemies, or something more.

3) CYOS, MYOS, CYOM, MYOM, MIOPE. Create your own initial message to interact with Meg however you want.

So anyway, have fun with this bot. I apologize for being away from the platform for so long and for the drop in quality. If you'll excuse me, I'll get back to playing Apex Legends and then head to the gym and repeat that every day.

Good morning, afternoon, or evening, and have a good roleplay :3
creator: TJK_tomas
